name: Aegis
description: A Maliwan pistol with a measured fire rate, strong elemental application, and excellent damage-over-time potential, especially in shock, incendiary, and corrosive variants. Barrel choice shifts its handling noticeably, ranging from steadier Dahl-style versions to heavier-hitting but less controlled Bandit-style rolls.
notes: Each shot carries an extra splash component worth 80% of the projectile damage, and that splash benefits from grenade-damage bonuses. It is primarily found as a standard world drop.
